default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between GrowthX and Homebase teams to discuss progress on AI-powered content generation project.](https://fathom.video/share/VhD5sTNDCW7eUevAhPTD-bsKSszqbsyU?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Significant progress made in automating keyword tagging, research, and incorporating GPT-4 outputs](https://fathom.video/share/VhD5sTNDCW7eUevAhPTD-bsKSszqbsyU?tab=summary&timestamp=18.0)
  - [Initial drafts of articles generated, ready for review and calibration](https://fathom.video/share/VhD5sTNDCW7eUevAhPTD-bsKSszqbsyU?tab=summary&timestamp=99.0)
  - [Discussions around improving image recommendations and formula handling](https://fathom.video/share/VhD5sTNDCW7eUevAhPTD-bsKSszqbsyU?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)

## Topics

### Keyword Automation

  - [4,485 keywords automatically tagged with product categories using AI](https://fathom.video/share/VhD5sTNDCW7eUevAhPTD-bsKSszqbsyU?tab=summary&timestamp=422.0)
  - [Process built to fetch keyword volume and difficulty data from third-party APIs](https://fathom.video/share/VhD5sTNDCW7eUevAhPTD-bsKSszqbsyU?tab=summary&timestamp=602.0)
  - [Keyword research flow created to find related keywords and summarize intent](https://fathom.video/share/VhD5sTNDCW7eUevAhPTD-bsKSszqbsyU?tab=summary&timestamp=678.0)

### Content Generation Flows

  - [Incorporated audience, title, and style variables to customize outputs](https://fathom.video/share/VhD5sTNDCW7eUevAhPTD-bsKSszqbsyU?tab=summary&timestamp=829.0)
  - [Added human review step to select relevant outline sections](https://fathom.video/share/VhD5sTNDCW7eUevAhPTD-bsKSszqbsyU?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Integrated GPT-4 outputs which have more natural writing style](https://fathom.video/share/VhD5sTNDCW7eUevAhPTD-bsKSszqbsyU?tab=summary&timestamp=1000.0)
  - [Exploring ways to incorporate Homebase context without making it too promotional](https://fathom.video/share/VhD5sTNDCW7eUevAhPTD-bsKSszqbsyU?tab=summary&timestamp=1209.0)

### Article Drafts

  - [Initial drafts generated, ready for team review and calibration](https://fathom.video/share/VhD5sTNDCW7eUevAhPTD-bsKSszqbsyU?tab=summary&timestamp=175.0)
  - [Improvements in structure, formatting, use of bullet points and headings](https://fathom.video/share/VhD5sTNDCW7eUevAhPTD-bsKSszqbsyU?tab=summary&timestamp=190.0)
  - [Some areas like introductions still need refinement](https://fathom.video/share/VhD5sTNDCW7eUevAhPTD-bsKSszqbsyU?tab=summary&timestamp=207.0)

### Image and Formula Handling

  - [Discussed adding step to recommend relevant images based on content](https://fathom.video/share/VhD5sTNDCW7eUevAhPTD-bsKSszqbsyU?tab=summary&timestamp=1447.0)
  - [Explored ways to properly render formulas and equations in text](https://fathom.video/share/VhD5sTNDCW7eUevAhPTD-bsKSszqbsyU?tab=summary&timestamp=1629.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Review initial article drafts and provide feedback](https://fathom.video/share/VhD5sTNDCW7eUevAhPTD-bsKSszqbsyU?tab=summary&timestamp=1777.0)
  - [Explore flow to cross-check existing content and suggest missing sections](https://fathom.video/share/VhD5sTNDCW7eUevAhPTD-bsKSszqbsyU?tab=summary&timestamp=1089.0)
  - [Continue refining prompts and variables for better outputs](https://fathom.video/share/VhD5sTNDCW7eUevAhPTD-bsKSszqbsyU?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
  - [Investigate formula rendering solutions](https://fathom.video/share/VhD5sTNDCW7eUevAhPTD-bsKSszqbsyU?tab=summary&timestamp=1664.0)
  - [Prioritize image recommendation integration](https://fathom.video/share/VhD5sTNDCW7eUevAhPTD-bsKSszqbsyU?tab=summary&timestamp=1597.0)

action_items.description: Create a flow to analyze existing pages, compare against keyword research to find missing sections, and generate image recommendations
